query:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(SUM(totalAmount), 0) as totalRevenue, 
  COUNT(*) as totalOrders 
FROM orders 
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) 
  AND orderStatus = 'completed'
